Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there has been no appearance at several scheduled hearings, and no response has been filed to the examiner's notes. The Court ordered the petition for probate of will off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
